article_target: Figure 11: normalized directional-coupler curves for the mode labeled E_y11 in Section IV, following Eq. (34) with the exact transverse root from Eq. (20).
ocr_note: The caption distinguishes solid curves for n1/n5 = 1.5 and dash-dot curves for n1/n5 = 1.1. The current baseline follows that reading and labels each family by a/A5 = 2a/lambda * sqrt(n1^2-n5^2).
